text.text:
Stopped by quickly to grab a drink and I parked right outside on Atlantic. Neglected to order ahead so ordered with staff and it didn’t take too long to get the drink. You can also use the kiosk to order. They’ll call out the number when your drink is ready and they do check receipts to match up your number. Definitely a grab-and-go place as there’s no seating.

I usually get the Coconut Mango Boom, which is essentially mango sago in drink form. It’s delicious and refreshing. Will return to try the Crisp Grape Boom, which seems to be another favorite.

text.text:
A new HeyTea spot added to SGV and I was extremely excited for this spot to open. Located in Atlantic Time Square by the side of the street, this place is extremely busy most days and at most times. Parking is plenty and free in an underground lot.

The shop is very small, adding to the large crowds of people, which leads to a lot of people crowding inside.

There's no crowd control or line control from the staff which is not ideal.

They recently added a self ordering kiosk instead of ordering with a cashier which directs the line a bit but because of the small space, it gets very crowded regardless.

Highly recommend to order on their app to avoid long waits and lines.

1. The Mango Grapefruit Boom is always my go to drink at HeyTea, a big plus with HeyTea is that their drinks are very customizable, from caffeine free tea to adding/removing ingredients, this drink is a must try if you love fruit tea type drinks. Cups are very well made and can be closed to save for another time.

As much as I love HeyTea because of their high quality drinks, this specific spot has a lot of work to do to improve crowd control, wait times, and cleanliness in the shop.

text.text:
Good drinks, but this location is understaffed.

Only one girl working at the front, I felt so bad for her. Tons of drinks just sitting on the counter, because you have to show your number to pick up the order. This location is tiny, so there’s nowhere to form any sort of line. So you have a dozen people all crowding at the counter, half of them trying to cut in front of others so they can show their code first. All of the people waiting inside to pick up their drinks were blocking new customers from entering to place their order on the kiosk. Everyone around me was complaining about this ridiculous situation.

It’s chaotic and inefficient. If this is the system they want to use, they should have more than one employee at the front counter…at least on the weekends. It took 25 minutes for me to receive my drinks after placing my order. I saw other reviews saying they waited 1-2 hours! So, I probably won’t return, as it’s too much of a hassle for me.

text.text:
This is my third time coming here. I came back to try different drinks after not liking my previous order, but this visit left me very frustrated and angry.
The drinks were below average. The King Jasmine Guava was okay, with a noticeable guava flavor, but the Jasmine Milk Tea had almost no jasmine aroma and tasted watery and overly sweet. Overall, the tea quality was not impressive. One positive point is that the drinks were prepared quickly, even though the shop was a little bit busy at that time.

The service was the biggest issue. The staff did not greet me or offer any assistance, unlike other shops where employees proactively check if customers need help. I initially ordered a King Jasmine Guava, then immediately added a Jasmine Milk Tea. At checkout, I happened to notice the total only reflected one drink, so I asked, "Did I order two drinks?"
At this point, she should have repeated and CONFIRMED my order, but she didn't. I had to repeat my order myself, and only after a while did she ask, "Do you want Jasmine Milk Tea or King Jasmine Milk Tea?" -- which was not what I had ordered. I asked, "Is that different?" because her question made no sense. I wanted to clarify further, but given her dismissive and unhelpful attitude, I didn't continue.
When I mentioned I couldn't order online and had called instead, she cut me off, told me to download the app, and walked away before I could ask why the website wasn't working.
Finally, when my order was ready, I had to ask for a bag, and it was handed to me without packing the drinks. I don't mind helping, but this felt unprofessional and dismissive. She had a dismissive, condescending attitude, behaving like a childish employee rather than a professional.  So DISAPPOINTED!
BE PROFESSIONAL!

Overall, the staff lacked basic customer service: no greeting, no confirmation, no proactive assistance, and no care in preparing the order. Combined with below-average drinks, the experience was frustrating. Staff training on basic service standards would make a significant difference.
Never return this place again.

text.text: I don’t understand the hype. The lines are long, they have a lot of workers but are slow. I was the only customer left and waiting for my drink, lo and behold it’s just been sitting there and no one called it out even though they called out previous drink #s. I think that happened the first time we were there as well. It’s pricier for boba, the pistachio king cloud jasmine was $8.99 for a 16oz-ish size cup. The flavors are not memorable, I could barely taste the green tea in my drinks. Drinks are aesthetic but not my cup of tea ☕️
